name: Dave Pike
abstract: David Samuel Pike (March 23, 1938 – October 3, 2015) was an American jazz vibraphone and marimba player. He appeared on many albums by Nick Brignola, Paul Bley and Kenny Clarke, Bill Evans, and Herbie Mann.

concerts.label: Benefit Concert for the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee
WLIB Festival of Music and Drama

about_quotes.speaker: Gary Burton
about_quotes.evidence: I’d never met Dave Pike, but I wanted to kind of stay, you know, anonymous.

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
